## Describe the bug

A clear description of what is wrong.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to …
2. Click on …
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happens. Include error messages, screenshots or console output if relevant.

## Environment

- Browser / version:
- Language (DE / FR / IT):
- Admin user? yes / no
